name: Servlet Runtime Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
description: A servlet runtime error message indicates an unhandled exception and may expose sensitive information such as file paths, database details, or internal code structure to an attacker.
detection_pattern: EXTERNAL[servlet_runtime] or STRUCTURAL[exception_handler] producing error output that flows to EGRESS without a TRANSFORM node that masks sensitive details. The error path bypasses sanitization and reaches the user directly.
